title: Toolstem Financial Data
description: Curated financial data MCP for AI agents — 3 tools: stock snapshot, deep company metrics, side-by-side company comparison. Pre-computed signals (UNDERVALUED, STRONG, ACCELERATING), DCF valuations, and CAGRs ready for agent prompts.

tool.title: Tool
tool.description: Which tool to run. If omitted, the actor runs a default demonstration (get_stock_snapshot for AAPL) so first-time evaluators see real output. Real usage should always specify a tool.

symbol.title: Stock Symbol
symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol for get_stock_snapshot and get_company_metrics (e.g., AAPL, MSFT, TSLA)
